launchPosture.paymentCopy: We will email a payment link before production begins.
launchPosture.fulfillmentWindow: Printed on demand, typically 2-7 business days before carrier transit.
launchPosture.cancellationWindow: Order requests can be changed or cancelled until the payment link is paid.
launchPosture.returnPolicy: Because items are printed on demand, returns are handled for damaged, misprinted, or incorrect items.

T-Shirts.fitNotes: Unisex tee sizing from the current Printful variant set.

T-Shirts.productionNote: Printed on demand after invoice payment.
T-Shirts.shippingNote: Shipping is estimated in the order desk before the request is sent.
